response.justification: Candidate is a seasoned full-stack engineer with 10+ years of experience across web, mobile, and backend systems, but lacks the specific Principal/IC6-level profile this role demands. There is no demonstrated experience building experimentation platforms, feature-flagging systems, telemetry/metrics infrastructure, or A/B testing frameworks at enterprise scale. The resume shows individual contributor breadth but not the multi-team systemic leadership, data-aptitude, or globally distributed high-availability systems experience required for IC6.
strengths: 10+ years polyglot engineering across TypeScript, Node.js, DLang, C/C++, Java
High-throughput experience at Sociomantic/Dunnhumby handling millions of HTTP requests/sec
Strong testing/craftsmanship culture (TDD, CI/CD, workshops, open source maintainership)
concerns: No experimentation, A/B testing, feature flagging, or metrics-platform experience
Title is Senior/Staff; no evidence of Principal-level cross-org architectural leadership
No demonstrated work on growth systems, statistical analysis, or guardrail/rollout frameworks
